performance: It is strongest when simplicity and small size matter most. It is less convincing when the buyer really needs more than one-cup convenience.
bestFor: Dorm rooms, offices, RV setups, studio kitchens, and any coffee setup where every inch of counter space matters.
avoidIf: You brew several cups back to back, want a large water reservoir, or need one machine to serve multiple people easily.
